articles.title: Binance Burns as Many BNB Tokens as Hacker Minted From Thin Air
articles.description: The burn removed over 2 million BNB from the circulating supply.

articles.title: Elon Musk Launches Foul Fragrance, Accepts Payment in Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin and Additional Altcoins
articles.description: Elon Musk is adding a new quirky product to his company’s lineup of goods and services that can be paid for with crypto. The billionaire’s tunneling startup Boring Company just launched a perfume called Burnt Hair, which Musk describes as “the finest fragrance on Earth.” “With a name like mine, getting into the fragrance business […]

articles.title: Developers disclose major vulnerability in all IBC-enabled chains on Cosmos
articles.description: Developers have disclosed a critical software vulnerability within all Cosmos blockchains that run the inter-blockchain communication protocol (IBC).

articles.title: Tether eliminates commercial paper from reserves
articles.description: Stablecoin issuer Tether has said for months it planned to improve the quality of its reserves.

articles.title: Ethereum Becoming Highly Centralized After Transition To Proof-of-Stake, Pundits Warn
articles.description: The Ethereum Merge took the blockchain to a Proof-of-Stake (POS) consensus mechanism, ridding it of miners and replacing them with validators. While switching to PoS has several benefits, the downside is now trickling home.

articles.title: Someone abused FTX’s withdrawal fee subsidy to mint $70,000 of XEN
articles.description: The exchange may have failed to recognize that it was minting XEN tokens on behalf of the attacker, per analysts.

articles.title: Terra Coin Price Balloons 30% – But Can LUNA Reach Higher Terrain?
articles.description: Terra (LUNA) woke up to a good day on Wednesday as the token made an impressive 30% jump in its price on the way to tallying a high of $3.08. Terra accounted for 25.06% of the entire token holdings among the top 100 ETH whales LUNA price surged by 30% today and hit $3.08 Bullish momentum is possible and trading price might reach $3.25 The crypto, though, immediately experienced price...

articles.title: India police launches blockchain-based complaint portal on Polygon
articles.description: The Indian police unit in Firozabad city in the northern state of Uttar Pradesh has launched an online complaint portal powered by Ethereum scaler Polygon. See related article: Blockchain in India got off on wrong foot, says former finance chief Fast facts The pilot portal, policecomplaintonblockchain.in, leverages blockchain technology’s immutability, which means complaints cannot be […]

articles.title: Shiba Inu: $SHIB Army Seems to Be Loving Collectible Card Game Shiba Eternity
articles.description: The community behind the meme-inspired cryptocurrency Shiba Inu ($SHIB) appears to be enjoying its collectible card game Shiba Eternity, which was released earlier this month and allows players to “fight without violence” with Shiboshis. The game has so far amassed a 4.6 rating out of 5 on the Google Play store, with over 11,000 users […]

articles.title: Polygon powers India police complaint portal, battling corruption
articles.description: The First Information Report (FIR) launched on Polygon allows the citizens of Firozabad to register complaints against the police without worry of it being dismissed or manipulated.
